title: BLANCHET FARM PROGRAM - 211info
text: BLANCHET FARM RESIDENTIAL RECOVERY BLANCHET FARM PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clean and sober housing and a working farm offering support that will allow a person to gain sobriety and take the necessary steps to become self-sufficient again. AA and NA support groups help build a foundation in recovery and the connection of friendships by working and living together towards a common goal. 11750 NE Finn Hill Loop Carlton, OR 97111 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Farm Manager: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Case Manager: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 241-4340 11 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 241-4340 ext 11 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon, primarily Yamhill County Services: Sober Living Homes * Men If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
